name: Invoice
description: Standard B2B invoices — supplier, amounts, line items, tax, payment terms.
instructions:
Extract the following fields:

- supplier_name (string)
- supplier_vat_number (string)
- invoice_number (string)
- invoice_date (date)
- due_date (date)
- currency (string)
- subtotal (number)
- vat_amount (number)
- total_amount (number)
- payment_status (string)
- line_items (array): each item has description, quantity, unit_price

Mark fields not present in the document as null.
